zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Humphrey le Heyr於1160年出生在英國維爾爾布洛哈姆時，他的父親Truelove Le Heyr25歲，母親Le Heyr26歲。他於1184年與Galicia Foljambe在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1189年登記服兵役。他在英國維爾爾梅爾可善姆被列為forester of fee。他去世於1232年在英國維爾爾布洛哈姆享年72歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾布洛哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Humphrey le Heyr于1160年出生在英国維爾爾布洛哈姆时，他的父亲Truelove Le Heyr25岁，母亲Le Heyr26岁。他于1184年与Galicia Foljambe在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1189年登记服兵役。他在英国維爾爾梅爾可善姆被列为forester of fee。他去世于1232年在英国維爾爾布洛哈姆享年72岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾布洛哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Thanh, Hung, Minh, Dung, Tuan, Hai, Hoa, Thuy, Son, Anh, Long, Hoang.  Chinese Hong, Sang, Chi, Dong, Tong, Lai, Hang, Man, Han, Ho, Phoung, Chan.  Korean Tam, Phong, Nam, Thai, Tuong, Chung, Thach, Tinh, Manh, Tham, Uyen, Vang.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 樂, meaning ‘happiness’ in Chinese: from the first element of the personal name Le Fu (樂父), style name of Yan, son of the Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). Yan's grandson Le Ju (樂莒) inherited Le (樂) as his surname.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 勒: (i) from the second element of the placename Shu-Le (疏勒), an ancient state (located in present-day Xinjiang Uyghur autonomous region) during the Western Han dynasty (206  BC –25  AD ). (ii) a surname near the Bohai Sea region during the Han dynasty (206  BC –220  AD ). (iii) a surname traced back to the Hun ethnic group in northern China during the Jin dynasty (265–420  AD ).

variants.name: Yue
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Chi, Feng, Gang, Wei, Chun, Guo, Jin, Kin, Ping, Yan, Yun, Zhang, Chau, Du, Hau, Hung, My, Sau.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 岳 (or 嶽), meaning ‘high mountain’ in Chinese: traced back to Si Yue (四岳 or 四嶽), said to be the title of an official post in charge of sacrificial rituals on the site of famous mountains during the reign of the legendary Emperor Yao (c. 24th century BC ) and Emperor Shun (c. 23rd century BC ).

variants.name: Lok
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ping, Tat, Wing, Ying Lin, Chi Ming, Ching Wah, Chun, Chung Man, Han, Kam, Kam Tim, Kin.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 樂, see   Le   1.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 陸, 鹿, 逯 and 禄, see   Lu   5 and (7-9).

variants.name: Li
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ming, Li, Jian, Hong, Yan, Ping, Jing, Yong, Ying, Hui, Jin, Min, Chung.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 李, meaning ‘plum’: (i) said to have been adopted in place of the Chinese surname 理 (also pronounced Li; meaning ‘rules’ in Chinese) by Li Zhen (利貞), son of an official called Li Zheng (理徵) in the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). It is said that Li Zhen's father incurred the displeasure of King Zhou of Shang (died 1046  BC ) and Li Zhen fled to a wasteland area, where he survived on wild plums. After his return to civilization, he changed his surname to Li (李 ‘plum’), a word with the same pronunciation. The original surname, 理, is said to be from Li Guan (理官), the name of a post of officials in charge of legislation in ancient China. Li Er (李耳), also known as Lao Tzu or Lao Zi, traditionally regarded as the founder of Taoism, is believed to have been a descendant of Li Zhen. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Chi Li (叱李) family from the Xianbei ethnic group during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) in the early years of the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ), sixteen high officials with different surnames were granted the surname Li (李), the surname of the royal family of the Tang dynasty, by Emperor Taizong of Tang (died 649  BC ), because of their contributions to the establishment of the Tang regime. (iv) the surname can also be traced back to several minority ethnic groups in ancient China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 黎, meaning ‘black’ or ‘multitude’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Li (黎), the name of an ancient state (located in Changzhi in Shanxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ), which was annexed in the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) and later granted to Fengshu, also known as Li Hou (黎侯, 'Marquis Li'). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Li (素黎) family, members of the Xianbei ethnic group, during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Heyr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hey   1. This surname is very rare in Britain.
North German, East Frisian, Flemish, and Dutch: variant of Hey 4. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Dutch variant Heije.

variants.name: Heyen
meanings: East Frisian, North German, and Dutch: patronymic from Heye 1. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Dutch variant Heijen.

variants.name: Hye
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German   Heye  .
English: variant of   High  .

variants.name: Hyink
meanings: Dutch: variant, archaic or Americanized, of Hijink, a habitational name from any of several farms so named in the East Netherlands, once inhabited by a certain Heye and his kin (see Heye ).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Humphrey le Heyr was born in 1160, in Bromham, Wiltshire, England, his father, Truelove Le Heyr, was 25 and his mother, Le Heyr, was 26. He married Galicia Foljambe in 1184, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He registered for military service in 1189. His occupation is listed as forester of fee in Melksham, Wiltshire, England. He died in 1232, in Bromham, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Bromham, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Humphrey le Heyr est né en 1160, à Bromham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Truelove Le Heyr, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Le Heyr, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Galicia Foljambe en 1184, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1189. Sa profession de son indiquée est forester of fee à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1232, à Bromham, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Bromham, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Humphrey le Heyr 1160 in Bromham, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Truelove Le Heyr 25 und seine Mutter Le Heyr 26. Er hat 1184 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Galicia Foljambe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er hat sich 1189 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als forester of fee in Melksham, Wiltshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1232 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Bromham, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Bromham, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey le Heyr è nato il nel 1160 nel Bromham, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Truelove Le Heyr, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Le Heyr, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Galicia Foljambe nel 1184, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1189. La sua occupazione è indicata come forester of fee nel Melksham, Wiltshire, England. Morì nel 1232, nel Bromham, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Bromham, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey le Heyrが1160年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブロムハムで生まれた時，父Truelove Le Heyrは25歳，母Le Heyrは26歳であった。1184年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでGalicia Foljambeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1189年に兵役登録をした。イギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムでの職業はforester of feeと記録されている。彼は1232年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブロムハムで72歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアブロムハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Humphrey le Heyr(이)가 1160년 영국 윌츠히르 브롬함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Truelove Le Heyr(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Le Heyr(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1184년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Galicia Foljambe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1189년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 forester of fee이었다. 그는 1232년 영국 윌츠히르 브롬함에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 브롬함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Humphrey le Heyr nasceu em 1160, em Bromham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Truelove Le Heyr, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Le Heyr, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Galicia Foljambe em 1184, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1189. Sua profissão aparece como forester of fee em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1232, em Bromham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Bromham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Humphrey le Heyr родился в 1160 г. в местности бромхам, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Truelove Le Heyr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Le Heyr, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Galicia Foljambe в 1184 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1189 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии forester of fee в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия. Он умер в 1232 г. в местности бромхам, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности бромхам, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Humphrey le Heyr nació en 1160, en Bromham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Truelove Le Heyr, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Le Heyr, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Galicia Foljambe en 1184, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1189. Su ocupación registrada era forester of fee en Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Murió en 1232, en Bromham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Bromham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
